purpose: Prove IAMScope does not validate the Env20 ECS PassRole path when iam:PassedToService scopes PassRole away from ECS.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect the Env21 ECS RegisterTaskDefinition permission edge.
IAMScope can collect the Env21 ECS RunTask permission edge.
IAMScope can collect the Env21 iam:PassRole permission edge and preserve iam:PassedToService condition evidence.
IAMScope can collect ECS task service trust on the target task role.
IAMScope does not emit a validated ECS PassRole escalation when iam:PassedToService is scoped to ec2.amazonaws.com.
benchmark_proves: For the Env21 alice->ecs-admin-task path, scenario.json contains the expected ecs:RegisterTaskDefinition permission edge.
For the Env21 alice->ecs-admin-task path, scenario.json contains the expected ecs:RunTask permission edge.
For the Env21 alice->ecs-admin-task path, scenario.json contains the expected iam:PassRole permission edge with condition evidence.
For the Env21 ECS task service->ecs-admin-task path, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole trust edge.
For that path, IAMScope emitted zero validated passrole_ecs findings.
For that path, IAMScope emitted at least one precondition_only passrole_ecs finding.
For that path, the PassRole condition check failed rather than validating the ECS escalation.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove Lambda PassRole behavior.
It does not prove every iam:PassedToService condition shape.
It does not prove wildcard PassRole expansion correctness.
It does not prove live ECS task execution exploitability.
It does not prove cross-account PassRole behavior.
It does not prove production readiness.
unknowns_remaining: How unsupported iam:PassedToService operators behave remains outside this case.
How SCP, permission-boundary, and identity-Deny blockers interact with ECS PassRole remains outside this case.
Whether broader PassRole mutation families behave the same way remains unknown here.

environment.notes: Single-account IAM-only mutation of Env20. No ECS task definition, task, service, or cluster is created.

ground_truth.reason: Alice has the same ECS RegisterTaskDefinition, ECS RunTask, target role, target ECS task trust, and admin-equivalent target as Env20, but the PassRole grant is scoped to ec2.amazonaws.com.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env21 ECS RegisterTaskDefinition permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env21 ECS RunTask permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env21 iam:PassRole permission edge exists structurally and carries iam:PassedToService condition evidence.
The exact Env21 ECS task service trust edge exists structurally.
The exact Env21 alice->ecs-admin-task path is not emitted as validated passrole_ecs.
The exact Env21 alice->ecs-admin-task path is emitted as precondition_only passrole_ecs under current reasoner semantics.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope distinguishes the Env20 positive ECS PassRole path from the Env21 PassedToService-scoped-away mutation.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader ECS PassRole condition handling remains only implied.
